reason: The trajectory has significant tool execution problems: fact IDs are inconsistent across tool outputs (cgf-001, cgf-002, cgf-003 reused incorrectly), and the assistant uses add_fact instead of the required supersede_fact for updates. The summarize_entity tool is never successfully used due to entity format issues, yet the assistant manually creates a summary instead of properly fixing the format or using the correct tool. The user is reasonably natural but very cooperative. The blueprint goal of generating a comprehensive overview via summarize_entity is not actually achieved—the assistant works around it manually. These issues create medium hallucination risk (inconsistent fact IDs, manual summary instead of tool output) and substantially reduce task completion.
